2985763.title: Filmmaker spotlight - clemence poesy
2985763.description: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director Clemence Poesy about her short, 'King of the Wind Demons'.
